cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us improve by tracking usage

banner.message: {siteName} uses cookies to personalize content and measure usage. Read our {privacyPolicy} for details.

modal.title: Cookie Preferences
modal.description: Control how {siteName} uses cookies to deliver a tailored experience.
modal.necessaryDesc: Required for {siteName} to remember your authentication and language preferences.
modal.functionalCookiesDesc: Enable product personalization, saved filters, and smoother navigation.
modal.analyticsCookiesDesc: Help us understand usage patterns so we can improve workflows and performance.
modal.marketingCookiesDesc: Allow us to share more relevant {siteName} updates and launch announcements.
modal.policyText: {siteName} only collects the minimum amount of information needed to keep your sessions secure and to measure anonymous usage trends. You can update these preferences whenever you like.
modal.policyContact: For more details reach out to privacy@{siteNameLower}.com or review the Privacy Policy. Essential cookies never store customer data or documents.
